meta.title: Career Twilight | Fables Monster Studio
meta.description: A sci-fi corporate horror one-shot for Mothership RPG. A routine evacuation gone catastrophically wrong aboard a research vessel.

hero.title: CAREER TWILIGHT
hero.tagline: A routine corporate evacuation mission. But could this be the twilight of your career?

cta.followPrompt: Don't want to miss the release? Follow us on

intro.polaroidCaption: Dr. Sofia Reiner — Head of R&D Lab
intro.p1: A routine corporate evacuation mission. Inner Rim, safe sector. You have dozens of these under your belt. Crumbs of information, corporate secrets. NDAs, top-secret scientific research…
intro.p2: Something went wrong on Twilight long before you arrived. Ambitions, paranoid secrecy, and systemic errors led to a catastrophe. Now the Twilight is a ticking time bomb ready to go off.
intro.p3: …Just another contract. But could this be the twilight of your career?

timeline.title: RESTRICTED — CLEARANCE LEVEL: WARDEN ONLY
timeline.warning: This section contains full plot details and spoilers. If you are a player, stop reading now.

entries.text: The Corporation purchased the tourist vessel Twilight and retrofitted it into a research laboratory.

Dr. Sofia Reiner took charge of the lab and began developing technology to integrate human consciousness into android bodies. Corporate prison inmates were shipped to the Twilight for experimentation.

Having made significant progress, Dr. Reiner secretly began testing the technology on her own staff — systematically murdering scientific personnel and transferring their consciousnesses into androids visually identical to the originals.
Test subjects began exhibiting increased aggression. Regular doses of specialized tranquilizers and mandatory medical examinations were prescribed.
Representatives of the Syndicate approached Dr. Reiner, offering to purchase her research.

Dr. Reiner was caught attempting to leak data to the Syndicate. She was escorted to Corporate HQ along with her closest staff — secretly androids. The remaining personnel were ordered to freeze all research and await further instructions.
A shortage of tranquilizers caused the android staff's mental state to deteriorate rapidly.
The Corporation dispatched your crew to evacuate the remaining personnel and prisoners.
Dr. Howard Meyer completely lost his mind. He locked himself in the aft section, intent on reaching the reactor and destroying the ship.

contract.heading: CORPORATE CONTRACT — FORM TW-7
contract.briefing: One week ago, Dr. Sofia Reiner — head of the R&D lab aboard the Twilight — was caught attempting to transfer classified information to the Syndicate. Dr. Reiner was escorted to HQ along with two top-clearance staff members. The remaining personnel were ordered to freeze operations and await further instructions.
contract.authorization: The Corporation has now authorized your squad to complete the evacuation.
contract.task1: Evacuate the employees (6 people) and the corporate prisoners (5 people). A crew manifest has been transmitted to each contractor.
contract.task2: Activate the ship's autonomous mode via the internal control panel.
contract.ndaReminder: The Corporation reminds you of your signed NDAs. Exercise extreme caution when transporting prisoners to the corporate vessel's cryopods.
contract.ndaClause: NDA CLAUSE: Viewing the contents of secured data is strictly prohibited.
contract.liability: § 14.2 — LIABILITY CLAUSE: Damage to corporate property, or intentional/unintentional harm inflicted upon Twilight personnel results in fines deducted directly from contractor pay, assessed on a case-by-case basis.
